name: G-12 validate-all: --check-cross-file-collisions rejects when the same rule id appears in two source files
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: a
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
' > tree/google/a.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: b
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
' > tree/google/b.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-cross-file-collisions 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -qi 'duplicate rule id' err.txt && echo collision_caught 1>&2
